name: ReflectWorld-MM: An Entity-Oriented Multimodal Memory System for Open-Ended Video Streams

description: arXiv:2607.09759v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Building assistants that can continually watch the world, remember what they see, and reason over their accumulated experience is a long-standing goal, and recently multimodal agents equipped with long-term memory over video streams have attracted increasing interest. Unfortunately, existing systems either keep their memory inside the mo...
author: Xiaokang Ma, Yifan Sun, Zhihong Jin, Jie Gu, Yudong Luo, Shenyi Shao, Chu Tang, Jingmin Chen, Li Pu
